description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints, allowing remote code execution.
The TLS heartbeat extension in OpenSSL can disclose process memory from vulnerable clients and servers.
Microsoft Windows SMBv1 server mishandles specially crafted packets, allowing remote code execution.
An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists when Netlogon establishes a vulnerable secure channel connection to a domain controller.
A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Server Message Block 3.1.1 when handling crafted requests.
Microsoft Exchange Server is affected by a server-side request forgery vulnerability that allows authentication bypass.
Windows Print Spooler improperly performs privileged file operations, enabling remote code execution.
Spring Framework applications running on JDK 9 or later can be vulnerable to remote code execution through data binding.
Apache HTTP Server path normalization and path traversal flaws can expose files outside configured document roots.
Citrix ADC and Citrix Gateway contain a directory traversal vulnerability that can lead to arbitrary code execution.
Citrix ADC and Citrix Gateway contain an unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability.
Progress MOVEit Transfer contains an SQL injection vulnerability that can allow unauthenticated access to databases.
F5 BIG-IP iControl REST authentication bypass can allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute system commands.
Fortinet FortiOS SSL VPN web portal contains a path traversal vulnerability that can disclose system files.
Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy heap-based buffer overflow can allow remote code execution.
VMware vCenter Server contains a remote code execution vulnerability in a vSphere Client plugin.
Zyxel firewalls are affected by an improper error message handling vulnerability that allows command injection.
Fortra GoAnywhere MFT contains a pre-authentication command injection vulnerability.
Microsoft Outlook contains an elevation of privilege vulnerability that can leak Net-NTLMv2 hashes.
Malicious code in XZ Utils release artifacts can interfere with SSH authentication in affected Linux distributions.
